function.name: sec_filing_search
function.description: Search and retrieve full-text SEC EDGAR filings for a publicly traded US company. Use this tool when you need authoritative official regulatory disclosures, risk factors, or management discussion and analysis (MD&A). Returns the full text of the filing, the filing date, and the accession number.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company (e.g., 'AAPL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA').

filing_type.description: The specific type of SEC filing to retrieve.

year.description: The 4-digit filing year. If omitted, defaults to the most recent filing available.
